rule_persisted.name: E2E Semantic Assertion Rule
rule_persisted.core_requirement: Every UI create/open/update gate must produce four labelled evidence layers: MECHANICAL_PASS, SEMANTIC_PASS, PERSISTENCE_PASS, NEGATIVE_PASS

layers.MECHANICAL_PASS: click/nav/toast/form-submit chain fires — necessary but not sufficient
layers.SEMANTIC_PASS: visible DOM carries the entity's actual business data via specific testids + asserted strings, not body-contains-substring
layers.PERSISTENCE_PASS: reload/search/re-open still shows the data; volatile UI-only state does NOT count
layers.NEGATIVE_PASS: stale fixture/fallback/golden-demo data is asserted absent via explicit not.toMatch / .not.toContainText assertions

required_report_fields: SEMANTIC_EVIDENCE: list of testids + asserted strings
NEGATIVE_EVIDENCE: list of forbidden strings confirmed absent
insurance_ai_platform_forbidden_markers: seed claim ids CLM-1006..CLM-1010 (when out of context)
goldenClaim customerId / vehicleVin / policyId / riskScore (when incongruent with route)
rule_persisted.rejection_rule: 100% pass rate is rejected if SEMANTIC_PASS or NEGATIVE_PASS were not explicitly asserted in the spec
rule_persisted.applies_to: all future UI/E2E gates, all projects

prompt_template_snippet_text: Do not count URL / navigation / toast as success. Assert visible business data via testids and asserted strings, and assert stale fixture / fallback data is absent. For every create / open / update flow, separate evidence into MECHANICAL_PASS, SEMANTIC_PASS, PERSISTENCE_PASS, and NEGATIVE_PASS. The report must label each layer pass/fail/n-a with the spec file, test name, and the testids / strings actually asserted. A 100% pass rate is rejected if SEMANTIC_PASS or NEGATIVE_PASS were not explicitly asserted.
limitations: ClaudeOS / claude-vault not mirrored — sacred-file constraint; AIKB is the canonical durable-rules repo for this rule
Prompt-template change applies forward only — past accepted reports not retroactively re-classified
Rule is process-only — Claude labels, GPT enforces; tooling auto-grep out of scope
Project-specific NEGATIVE markers explicit for InsuranceAIPlatform only; other projects inherit the cross-project four-layer requirement
No new product test runs in this gate; 89/89, 137/137, FE build PASS are inherited from PostManualV4 fix
